articles.title: Consumer staples win on defensive bets in Q1; Bunge, ADM lead gains (XLP:NYSEARCA)
articles.summary: In Q1 2026, consumer staples emerged as a strong defensive sector, with investors shifting away from a declining S&P 500. Upstream food suppliers like Bunge Global and Archer-Daniels-Midland, along with retailers Target and Kroger, were key drivers of gains within the sector. Analysts note compressed valuations and high short interest, indicating a complex outlook for consumer staples going into 2026.
